recommendations.title: Ben 10: Destroy All Aliens
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Action, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Based on the original animated series Ben 10.  Ben becomes targeted by an evil Mechamorph Warrior, named "Retaliator," who mistakenly blames Ben for something he did not do and attempts to destroy all aliens.

recommendations.title: Bhoothnath
recommendations.overview: Moving into a new house, a family witnesses an unfriendly ghost who wants to drive them away from the house. However, he befriends a little boy who changes his outlook forever.

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: Family for Christmas

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
recommendations.overview: A Californian family inherits a castle in Romania. This is especially exciting to the son, who is obsessed with monsters. And he is not disappointed.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Ben 10: Race Against Time
recommendations.genres: Action, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Ben, Gwen, and Max must stop an extraterrestrial who plans to open a gateway that leads to an alien invasion.

recommendations.title: Ben 10: Alien Swarm
recommendations.overview: Ben and a mysterious girl from his past must prevent an alien threat from destroying the world.
